headline: DriveNets High-Performance AI Networking Available on the Dell AI Factory
summary: DriveNets, a leader in high-scale networking solutions, today announced DriveNets' Fabric Scheduled Ethernet (FSE) solution will be an option for customers to leverage on the Dell AI Factory to deliver high-performance AI clusters. The solution expands the options within Dell's portfolio to address the high-performance needs of large-scale multi-tenant AI clusters, clusters deployed across multiple sites, clusters supporting GPU as a Service (GPUaaS) offering, and converged back-end and storage

headline: NVIDIA Extends On Premises AI Reach As Valuation Stays Above Fair Value
summary: Dell Technologies and NVIDIA (NasdaqGS:NVDA) launched Dell Deskside Agentic AI, available immediately. The solution lets enterprises run and manage agentic AI models from 30 billion to 1 trillion parameters locally on high-performance workstations. It extends the Dell AI Factory with NVIDIA across desktops and datacenter servers using NVIDIA OpenShell and NemoClaw. The platform focuses on data sovereignty, predictable costs, and secure scaling for multi-agent AI workflows. For investors...
